## Bremer Apartment
Bremer Apartment stands on a quiet street in Greenwich Village, Manhattan. It is a six-story brick building built in the 1920s. All kinds of people live in the building: actors, lawyers, students, musicians, waiters, programmers, and immigrant families. They come from different states and different countries, yet somehow they end up sharing the same staircase, the same hallway, and the same thin apartment walls. the confusion of youth
